name: omok-server
description: Omok (Korean Gomoku) WebSocket server with static file serving for the FE.

scripts.test: STORE_BACKEND=memory BOT_OFFER_DELAY_MS=1000 DISCONNECT_GRACE_MS=1500 SPECTATOR_DISCONNECT_GRACE_MS=500 PORT=18080 STATIC_ROOT=. node server.js & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT; sleep 1; node __tests__/recovery.test.js
